metadata.description: Comprehensive Russian nuclear/strategic target list with verified coordinates

targets.name: Kozelsk - 28th Guards Missile Division
targets.description: RS-24 Yars silo field, 3 regiments (~30 silos), 240km SW of Moscow, Kaluga Oblast

targets.name: Tatishchevo - 60th Missile Division
targets.description: 60 SS-27 Mod 1 (Topol-M) silo-based ICBMs, 6 regiments, Saratov Oblast

targets.name: Tatishchevo - 104th Regiment
targets.description: Silo regiment of 60th Missile Division

targets.name: Tatishchevo - 122nd Regiment
targets.description: Silo regiment of 60th Missile Division

targets.name: Tatishchevo - 165th Regiment
targets.description: Silo regiment of 60th Missile Division

targets.name: Tatishchevo - 322nd Regiment
targets.description: Silo regiment of 60th Missile Division

targets.name: Tatishchevo - 626th Regiment
targets.description: Silo regiment of 60th Missile Division

targets.name: Dombarovsky - 13th Missile Division
targets.description: SS-18/Avangard HGV silos, Orenburg Oblast. Up to 64 silos at peak

targets.name: Uzhur - 62nd Missile Division (229th Regiment)
targets.description: SS-18 silos being upgraded to RS-28 Sarmat, Krasnoyarsk Krai

targets.name: Uzhur - 269th Regiment
targets.description: Silo regiment of 62nd Missile Division

targets.name: Uzhur - 302nd Regiment
targets.description: Silo regiment of 62nd Missile Division

targets.name: Uzhur - 735th Regiment
targets.description: Silo regiment of 62nd Missile Division

targets.name: Kartaly (decommissioned)
targets.description: Former SS-18 deployment site, Chelyabinsk Oblast. Division liquidated 2005

targets.name: Aleysk (decommissioned)
targets.description: Former 41st Guards Missile Division, 30 SS-18 silos destroyed under CTR program by 2001

targets.name: Teykovo - 54th Guards Missile Division (235th Regiment)
targets.description: Road-mobile SS-27 Mod 1/Mod 2 (Yars), Ivanovo Oblast

targets.name: Teykovo - 285th Regiment
targets.description: Road-mobile regiment, 54th Guards Missile Division

targets.name: Teykovo - 321st Regiment
targets.description: Road-mobile regiment, 54th Guards Missile Division

targets.name: Teykovo - 773rd Regiment
targets.description: Road-mobile regiment, 54th Guards Missile Division

targets.name: Yoshkar-Ola - 14th Missile Division (290th Regiment)
targets.description: Road-mobile RS-24 Yars, Mari El Republic

targets.name: Yoshkar-Ola - 697th Regiment
targets.description: Road-mobile regiment, 14th Missile Division

targets.name: Yoshkar-Ola - 779th Regiment
targets.description: Road-mobile regiment, 14th Missile Division

targets.name: Novosibirsk - 39th Guards Missile Division (382nd Regiment)
targets.description: Road-mobile RS-24 Yars, Novosibirsk Oblast (Paskino)

targets.name: Novosibirsk - 357th Regiment
targets.description: Road-mobile regiment, 39th Guards Missile Division

targets.name: Nizhny Tagil - 42nd Missile Division (308th Regiment)
targets.description: Road-mobile RS-24 Yars, Sverdlovsk Oblast

targets.name: Nizhny Tagil - 433rd Regiment
targets.description: Road-mobile regiment, 42nd Missile Division

targets.name: Nizhny Tagil - 804th Regiment
targets.description: Road-mobile regiment, 42nd Missile Division

targets.name: Irkutsk - 29th Guards Missile Division (92nd Regiment)
targets.description: Road-mobile RS-24 Yars, Irkutsk Oblast

targets.name: Irkutsk - 344th Regiment
targets.description: Road-mobile regiment, 29th Guards Missile Division

targets.name: Irkutsk - 586th Regiment
targets.description: Road-mobile regiment, 29th Guards Missile Division

targets.name: Barnaul - 35th Missile Division (479th Guards Regiment)
targets.description: Road-mobile RS-24 Yars, Altai Krai (ZATO Sibirsky)

targets.name: Barnaul - 480th Regiment
targets.description: Road-mobile regiment, 35th Missile Division

targets.name: Barnaul - 867th Regiment
targets.description: Road-mobile regiment, 35th Missile Division

targets.name: Barnaul - 307th Regiment
targets.description: Road-mobile regiment, 35th Missile Division

targets.name: Vypolzovo/Bologoye - 7th Guards Missile Division (41st Regiment)
targets.description: Road-mobile RS-24 Yars, Tver Oblast. Westernmost RVSN division

targets.name: Vypolzovo/Bologoye - 510th Regiment
targets.description: Road-mobile regiment, 7th Guards Missile Division

targets.name: Kansk - 23rd Guards Missile Division (disbanded)
targets.description: Former mobile ICBM base, disbanded 2007. Kansk city coordinates

targets.name: Gadzhiyevo (Yagelnaya Bay) - Northern Fleet SSBN Base
targets.description: Home port for Borei and Delta-IV class SSBNs. Kola Peninsula, Arctic Circle

targets.name: Vilyuchinsk (Rybachiy) - Pacific Fleet SSBN Base
targets.description: Borei-class SSBNs, Kamchatka Peninsula. Russia's largest submarine facility

targets.name: Severodvinsk - Sevmash Shipyard
targets.description: Russia's only nuclear submarine construction facility. 30,000 employees, White Sea

targets.name: Engels-2 Air Base
targets.description: Russia's sole Tu-160 base + Tu-95MS. 22nd Guards Heavy Bomber Division, Saratov Oblast

targets.name: Ukrainka Air Base
targets.description: Tu-95MS strategic bombers, 326th Heavy Bomber Division, Amur Oblast, Far East

targets.name: Moscow Kremlin - Presidential Command
targets.description: Russian President's official residence and office, supreme nuclear command authority

targets.name: Russian General Staff HQ - Znamenka Street
targets.description: General Staff of Russian Armed Forces, Arbat District, Moscow. Operational command center

targets.name: Vlasikha - Strategic Rocket Forces HQ
targets.description: RVSN headquarters, closed town west of Moscow. 12-tier underground bunker (built 1986)

targets.name: Kosvinsky Kamen - Alternate Strategic Command Post
targets.description: Deep underground bunker under 300m of granite. Perimeter/Dead Hand command post, Northern Urals

targets.name: Mount Yamantau - Nuclear War Bunker
targets.description: Massive underground facility, 1640m mountain. Leadership relocation bunker, Southern Urals, Bashkortostan

targets.name: National Defense Management Center - Moscow
targets.description: Founded 2014, central C2 node for Russian Armed Forces, Frunzenskaya Embankment

targets.name: Sarov (Arzamas-16) - VNIIEF
targets.description: Russia's primary nuclear warhead design institute + Avangard assembly plant, Nizhny Novgorod Oblast

targets.name: Snezhinsk (Chelyabinsk-70) - VNIITF
targets.description: Second nuclear warhead design center, Chelyabinsk Oblast

targets.name: Zheleznogorsk (Krasnoyarsk-26) - Mining & Chemical Combine
targets.description: Underground plutonium production complex (200-250m deep), last reactor shut down 2010, Krasnoyarsk Krai

targets.name: Seversk (Tomsk-7) - Siberian Chemical Combine
targets.description: Russia's largest plutonium production & fissile material complex, Tomsk Oblast

targets.name: Ozersk (Chelyabinsk-65) - Mayak Production Association
targets.description: Plutonium production, reprocessing, weapons-grade material storage, Chelyabinsk Oblast

targets.name: Novouralsk (Sverdlovsk-44) - Uranium Enrichment
targets.description: Uranium enrichment plant, Sverdlovsk Oblast

targets.name: Lesnoy (Sverdlovsk-45) - Warhead Assembly
targets.description: Nuclear warhead serial production plant, Sverdlovsk Oblast

targets.name: Trekhgornyy (Zlatoust-36) - Instrument Making Plant
targets.description: Nuclear warhead component manufacturing, Chelyabinsk Oblast

targets.name: Zarechnyy (Penza-19) - Start Production Association
targets.description: Nuclear warhead final assembly/disassembly, Penza Oblast

targets.name: Zelenogorsk (Krasnoyarsk-45) - Electrochemical Plant
targets.description: Uranium enrichment facility, Krasnoyarsk Krai

targets.category: Naval Fleet HQ / Major Military Base
targets.name: Severomorsk - Northern Fleet HQ
targets.description: Northern Fleet headquarters, Kola Peninsula, Barents Sea. Russia's primary nuclear fleet

targets.category: Naval Fleet HQ / Major Military Base
targets.name: Vladivostok - Pacific Fleet HQ
targets.description: Pacific Fleet headquarters, Ulysses Bay, Primorsky Krai

targets.category: Naval Fleet HQ / Major Military Base
targets.name: Baltiysk - Baltic Fleet Main Base
targets.description: Baltic Fleet principal seaward base, Kaliningrad Oblast

targets.category: Naval Fleet HQ / Major Military Base
targets.name: Kaliningrad - Baltic Fleet HQ
targets.description: Baltic Fleet headquarters city, Kaliningrad Oblast exclave

targets.category: Naval Fleet HQ / Major Military Base
targets.name: Sevastopol - Black Sea Fleet HQ
targets.description: Black Sea Fleet headquarters, Crimea (annexed 2014)

targets.category: Naval Fleet HQ / Major Military Base
targets.name: Polyarny - Northern Fleet Submarine Base
targets.description: Attack submarine base, Kola Peninsula

targets.category: Naval Fleet HQ / Major Military Base
targets.name: Vidyayevo - Northern Fleet Submarine Base
targets.description: Attack submarine base (Ura Bay), Kola Peninsula

targets.category: Naval Fleet HQ / Major Military Base
targets.name: Olenya Bay - Northern Fleet Air Base
targets.description: Tu-22M3 Backfire bomber base, Kola Peninsula

targets.name: Moscow
targets.description: Capital, 13M+ pop. Political/economic center, national command authority

targets.name: Saint Petersburg
targets.description: 5.6M pop. Cultural capital, major naval/military industry, Baltic access

targets.name: Novosibirsk
targets.description: 1.6M pop. Largest Siberian city, major rail/industrial hub

targets.name: Yekaterinburg
targets.description: 1.5M pop. Urals industrial center, military-industrial complex

targets.name: Kazan
targets.description: 1.3M pop. Tatarstan capital, aerospace/defense industry

targets.name: Nizhny Novgorod
targets.description: 1.3M pop. Major defense industry center, Volga region

targets.name: Chelyabinsk
targets.description: 1.2M pop. Urals heavy industry, tank/vehicle manufacturing

targets.name: Samara
targets.description: 1.2M pop. Aerospace center (Progress rocket factory), Volga region

targets.name: Omsk
targets.description: 1.1M pop. Major Siberian industrial city, oil refining

targets.name: Rostov-on-Don
targets.description: 1.1M pop. Southern Military District HQ, major transport hub

targets.name: Ufa
targets.description: 1.1M pop. Bashkortostan capital, oil/petrochemical industry

targets.name: Krasnoyarsk
targets.description: 1.1M pop. Major Siberian city, aluminum/defense industry

targets.name: Voronezh
targets.description: 1.0M pop. Aerospace/electronics industry, Central Russia

targets.name: Perm
targets.description: 1.0M pop. Urals industrial center, rocket engine manufacturing

targets.name: Volgograd
targets.description: 1.0M pop. Major Volga city, heavy industry

targets.name: Krasnodar
targets.description: 950K+ pop. Southern Russia economic center

targets.name: Saratov
targets.description: 900K+ pop. Volga region, near Engels-2 bomber base

targets.name: Tyumen
targets.description: 850K+ pop. Oil industry capital of Western Siberia

targets.name: Tolyatti
targets.description: 700K+ pop. Volga automotive industry center (AvtoVAZ/Lada)

targets.name: Izhevsk
targets.description: 650K+ pop. Udmurt Republic, Kalashnikov weapons manufacturing

targets.name: Barnaul
targets.description: 630K+ pop. Altai Krai capital, near 35th Missile Division

targets.name: Ulyanovsk
targets.description: 630K+ pop. Aviastar aircraft factory (Il-76, An-124)

targets.name: Irkutsk
targets.description: 617K+ pop. Major Siberian city, near 29th Guards Missile Division

targets.name: Khabarovsk
targets.description: 617K+ pop. Eastern Military District HQ, Far East major city

targets.name: Vladivostok
targets.description: 604K+ pop. Pacific Fleet HQ, major Far East port

targets.name: Yaroslavl
targets.description: 577K+ pop. Central Russia, diesel engine manufacturing

targets.name: Makhachkala
targets.description: 600K+ pop. Dagestan capital, Caspian Sea port

targets.name: Kemerovo
targets.description: 557K+ pop. Kuzbass coal mining region center

targets.name: Tomsk
targets.description: 556K+ pop. Major Siberian university/science city, near Seversk nuclear complex

targets.name: Orenburg
targets.description: 550K+ pop. Southern Urals, 31st Rocket Army HQ city

targets.name: Naberezhnye Chelny
targets.description: 548K+ pop. Tatarstan, KAMAZ truck manufacturing

targets.name: Novokuznetsk
targets.description: 540K+ pop. Kemerovo Oblast, steel/metallurgy center

targets.name: Ryazan
targets.description: 520K+ pop. Central Russia, airborne forces training center

targets.name: Lipetsk
targets.description: 510K+ pop. Steel industry, combat pilot training center

targets.name: Astrakhan
targets.description: 502K+ pop. Caspian Flotilla base, Volga delta

targets.name: Kirov
targets.description: 500K+ pop. Volga-Ural region, defense industry

targets.name: Penza
targets.description: 520K+ pop. Near Zarechnyy nuclear warhead assembly plant

targets.name: Cheboksary
targets.description: 500K+ pop. Chuvash Republic capital, electronics industry

targets.name: Tula
targets.description: 500K+ pop. Historic arms manufacturing center (Tula Arms Plant)
